inputs.label: Electricity Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Annual grid or purchased electricity consumption.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual grid or purchased electricity consumption.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık şebeke veya satın alınan elektrik tüketimi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher Strombezug aus dem Netz oder zugekaufter Strom.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Consommation annuelle d'électricité du réseau ou achetée.

inputs.label: Location-Based Emission Factor
inputs.businessContext: Grid average emission factor from national or regional authority.

label_i18n.fr: Facteur d'émission basé sur la localisation

businessContext_i18n.en: Grid average emission factor from national or regional authority.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ulusal veya bölgesel otoriteden şebeke ortalama emisyon faktörü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher Netz-Emissionsfaktor der nationalen oder regionalen Behörde.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur d'émission moyen du réseau provenant de l'autorité nationale ou régionale.

inputs.label: Market-Based Emission Factor
inputs.businessContext: Supplier-specific or residual mix emission factor.

label_i18n.fr: Facteur d'émission basé sur le marché

businessContext_i18n.en: Supplier-specific or residual mix emission factor.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tedarikçiye özgü veya artık karışım emisyon faktörü.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur d'émission spécifique au fournisseur ou du mix résiduel.

inputs.label: Purchased Heat Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Annual purchased heat/steam/cooling converted to MWh.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual purchased heat/steam/cooling converted to MWh.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık satın alınan ısı/buhar/soğutma MWh'ye dönüştürülmüş.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlich zugekaufte Wärme/Dampf/Kälte, umgerechnet in MWh.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Chaleur/vapeur/froid acheté annuellement converti en MWh.

businessContext_i18n.tr: Satın alınan ısı/buhar/soğutma için emisyon faktörü.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur d'émission pour la chaleur/la vapeur/le froid achetés.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
